targets.rawSql: SELECT SUM(max_daily) as value FROM (SELECT date_trunc('day', update_time) as t, inverter_sn, MAX(daily_inverter_output_kwh) as max_daily FROM inverter_data WHERE $__timeFilter(update_time) GROUP BY 1, 2) as sub;
SELECT date_trunc('day', update_time) as "time", MAX(daily_inverter_output_kwh) as "Daily Yield", inverter_sn FROM inverter_data WHERE $__timeFilter(update_time) GROUP BY 1, 3 ORDER BY 1

SELECT day as time, SUM(daily_sum) OVER (ORDER BY day) as "Cumulative Yield" FROM (SELECT t as day, SUM(max_daily) as daily_sum FROM (SELECT date_trunc('day', update_time) as t, inverter_sn, MAX(daily_inverter_output_kwh) as max_daily FROM inverter_data WHERE $__timeFilter(update_time) GROUP BY 1, 2) as sub GROUP BY 1) as running ORDER BY 1;
SELECT date_trunc('day', update_time) as "time", MAX(daily_inverter_output_kwh) as "Daily Yield", inverter_sn FROM inverter_data WHERE $__timeFilter(update_time) GROUP BY 1, 3 ORDER BY 1

SELECT t as time, SUM(max_daily) as "Total Plant Yield" FROM (SELECT date_trunc('day', update_time) as t, inverter_sn, MAX(daily_inverter_output_kwh) as max_daily FROM inverter_data WHERE $__timeFilter(update_time) GROUP BY 1, 2) as sub GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 1

panels.title: Daily Yield: Individual vs Total Plant
